name: Happy Creek Minerals Ltd.
summary: Happy Creek Minerals Ltd. engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties in Canada. It primarily explores for copper, molybdenum, rhenium, indium, tungsten, gold, silver, lead, and zinc deposits. The company owns a 100% interest in the Highland Valley property, which consists of the Rateria property that comprises 31 mineral tenures totaling approximately 10,350 hectares and the West Valley property that comprises 32 mineral tenures totaling approximately 14,957 hectares. It also has 100% interests in the Silverboss property that consists of 38 mineral tenures totaling approximately 10,711 hectares; the Hen-Art-DL property, which consists of 13 mineral tenures totaling approximately 6,047 hectares; the Fox property that consists of 36 mineral tenures totaling approximately 17,245 hectares; the Black Riders property that consists of 6 mineral tenures totaling approximately 2,564 hectares; the Hawk property, which consists of 19 mineral tenures totaling approximately 1,976 hectares; and the Eye property that consists of 1 mineral tenure totaling approximately 119 hectares. The company was incorporated in 2004 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
